summary: Phase 3 testing complete: Backend batch installment endpoint (POST /api/cards/installments/batch) fully functional. Frontend TransactionModal correctly displays installment options (Parcelas dropdown, Card selector) when 'Crédito' is selected as payment method for despesas.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render - cosmetic only, charts display correctly
Console warnings about missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - returns healthy status
Backend: GET /api - returns running status
Backend: Authentication with valid session token - 200 OK
Backend: Authentication without token - 401 Unauthorized
Backend: Authentication with invalid token - 401 Unauthorized
Backend: GET /api/categories - returns user categories
Backend: POST/PUT/DELETE /api/categories - CRUD operations working
Backend: GET /api/transactions - returns user transactions
Backend: GET /api/transactions?tipo=receita/despesa - filter by type works
Backend: GET /api/transactions/summary - returns correct saldo calculation
Backend: POST /api/transactions - creates transaction and updates budget
Backend: GET /api/cards - returns cards with correct fatura_atual
Backend: Business Rule - fatura_atual = sum of unpaid installments - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/cards/{id}/installments - returns card installments
Backend: GET /api/budgets - returns user budgets
Backend: GET /api/budgets/summary - returns total budget summary
Backend: GET /api/investments - returns user investments
Backend: GET /api/investments/total - returns correct total
Backend: GET /api/goals - returns user goals
Backend: GET /api/accounts - returns user bank accounts
Backend: POST /api/cards/installments/batch - creates N installments with correct valor_parcela and monthly dates
Backend: POST /api/cards/installments/batch - recalculates card fatura_atual and usado correctly
Backend: POST /api/cards/installments/batch - returns 400 for invalid card_id
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 'Nova Transação' button
Frontend: 'Nova Transação' button opens TransactionModal
Frontend: TransactionModal shows Receita/Despesa type selector at bottom
Frontend: TransactionModal displays installment section when 'Crédito' is selected as payment method
Frontend: Installment section shows Parcelas dropdown (1x to 12x)
Frontend: Installment section shows Card selector dropdown
Frontend: Despesas page 'Nova Despesa' button opens TransactionModal
Frontend: Despesas page TransactionModal has Método de Pagamento dropdown
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render - cosmetic issue
Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement
seed_data_creation: Created test card (card_test_phase3) and category (cat_test_phase3) for test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 implementation complete and verified. Backend batch endpoint creates N installments with correct monthly date offsets and recalculates card totals. Frontend TransactionModal conditionally shows installment options when Crédito is selected. All data-testid attributes are in place: tx-modal-valor, tx-modal-descricao, tx-modal-categoria, tx-modal-metodo, tx-modal-parcelas, tx-modal-card, tx-modal-installment-section, tx-modal-save.

business_rules_verified.batch_installment_creation: VERIFIED - Creates N installments with valor_parcela = valor_total / total_parcelas
business_rules_verified.monthly_date_offsets: VERIFIED - Each installment has date offset by 1 month from previous
business_rules_verified.card_fatura_recalculation: VERIFIED - fatura_atual and usado updated after batch creation
